claim: Cortex AI SQL provides multimodal functions like AI complete, AI filter, and AI summarize that compose with standard SQL semantics (CTEs, joins, where clauses)
actionable: Use AI filter with natural language instructions like 'was the customer satisfied' in WHERE clauses instead of writing regex patterns
source_title: Snowflake: A SQL Engine to Talk to Your Data

claim: AI SQL query optimization can reduce LLM calls from 110,000 to 330 by reordering filters to minimize data before expensive LLM operations
actionable: Order SQL filters from cheapest (CPU-bound) to most expensive (LLM) operations to minimize LLM invocations
source_title: Snowflake: A SQL Engine to Talk to Your Data

claim: Cascade thresholding with proxy models (smaller, cheaper LLMs) can improve both latency (20-500% faster) and accuracy by handling high-confidence cases locally
actionable: Use smaller models to establish confidence thresholds (upper/lower bounds); only escalate uncertain cases to larger models
source_title: Snowflake: A SQL Engine to Talk to Your Data

claim: Query rewrites for classification tasks (converting cross-joins to single LLM calls) can improve F1 score from 6% to 80% when the LLM sees all candidate labels simultaneously
actionable: When matching one item to N categories (N < 1000), pass all categories in one prompt as a classification task instead of pairwise comparisons
source_title: Snowflake: A SQL Engine to Talk to Your Data

claim: Cortex AI SQL works with role-based access control, budget constraints, and data encryption natively for governance
actionable: Leverage existing Snowflake governance features (RBAC, encryption) without extra implementation when using AI SQL functions
source_title: Snowflake: A SQL Engine to Talk to Your Data
